data.reasoningText:
This is a legacy-style .NET Framework project using `packages.config` format. To convert to Central Package Management (CPM), I need to:

1. First convert from `packages.config` to `PackageReference` format in the `.csproj`
2. Then set up CPM with `Directory.Packages.props`

Let me check if there's already a `Directory.Packages.props` in the parent directory.

data.content:
This project uses the legacy `packages.config` format (not `PackageReference`). CPM requires `PackageReference` first. Here's what I'll do:

1. Convert `packages.config` → `PackageReference` in the `.csproj`
2. Remove `packages.config` and the old `HintPath` reference
3. Create `Directory.Packages.props` for CPM

Let me make all the changes:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-700ec6b931c24de48938c7287e37c800/simple-packages-config/LegacyApp/LegacyApp.csproj", "old_str": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="Newtonsoft.Json, Version=13.0.0.0">
      <HintPath>..\packages\Newtonsoft.Json.13.0.3\lib\net45\Newtonsoft.Json.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>", "new_str": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>"}

toolResult.sessionLog:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-700ec6b931c24de48938c7287e37c800/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props b/tmp/sv-700ec6b931c24de48938c7287e37c800/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props
create file mode 100644
index 0000000..0000000
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/tmp/sv-700ec6b931c24de48938c7287e37c800/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props
@@ -1,0 +1,9 @@
+<Project>
+  <PropertyGroup>
+    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
+  </PropertyGroup>
+  <ItemGroup>
+    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
+  </ItemGroup>
+</Project>
+

data.content:
Done. Here's what changed:

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `packages.config` | **Deleted** — legacy format removed |
| `LegacyApp.csproj` | Old `<Reference>` with `HintPath` → `<PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />` (no version — managed centrally) |
| `Directory.Packages.props` | **Created** — enables CPM with `Newtonsoft.Json` version `13.0.3` |

The version is now centrally managed in `Directory.Packages.props` and the project references the package without specifying a version.
